MBBS, DNB Reg. No: DL/34567/2016 Wellness Clinic, Bengaluru

| Patient Name   | Rajesh Kumar   |
|----------------|----------------|
| Age            | 39 Years       |
| Gender         | Male           |
| Date           | 01-Nov-2024    |

## Chief Complaint

Persistent fever and mild headache.

## Diagnosis

Upper Respiratory Tract Infection

## Prescription

1. Azithromycin 500mg - once daily for 3 days
2. Paracetamol 650mg - SOS
3. Steam inhalation twice daily
